title: Bump github.com/containers/image/v5 from 5.19.0 to 5.19.1

comments.body: Why do I not see the CI jobs?  @cevich ... heeeelp
Hopefully it will repush and we will get CI

Not sure what happened here with Cirrus-CI.  It did run [on the branch after merge (log)](https://cirrus-ci.com/build/4762825385050112).  I took a look at a few of the failures, they all appear to be quay.io outage related.
